description: Lock Civic Contract Registries to public/legal record infrastructure rather than merchant partnership contracts as a prerequisite.

checks.reason: Merchant partnership contracts are one possible class of contract that could be recorded, not prerequisite infrastructure for public contract registries.
The scoped registry records legally meaningful property and contract transactions.
The scoped registry depends on civic publication and recordkeeping practices.
The node should stay anchored to the ca. 450 BCE Athenian public-property lease evidence rather than the Classical era default.
